name: Goblin Dungeoneer
short_description: Prepare for "Hell in Video Game Form" in this brutal, tough as nails, retro, platforming-adventure game! Save your starving tribe by collecting riches within a spike filled dungeon!
detailed_description:
THE DUNGEON AWAITS:

Prepare for "hell in video game form"! Goblin Dungeoneer is a tough as nails platforming game developed by CrackedGhostGames. Traverse through 50 unique levels, leap over dangerous spike pits, dodge dangerous arrow traps, and much more! Enter the dungeon to save your starving goblin tribe!

You are going to die... A lot... What kind of dungeon would this be if it wasn't dangerous? Also, coyote time is for COWARDS! IMAGINE JUMPING ON AIR! Good luck, kid.

Goblin Dungeoneer is a PRECISION PLATFORMER! You are going to need PRECISE movement to succeed!

FEATURES:

  • 50 Unique Levels!
  • 5 Worlds!
  • A bangin' soundtrack!
  • Challenge Modes!
  • Secrets!
